productDisplayName: Nike Men Classic Jersey Black Track Pants
description: Composition Black track pants for men made of 100% cotton, has a wide waist band with a drawstring, two insert pockets, a patch pocket at the back, stitch detailing and a nike swoosh below the left pocket Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Get more out of your workouts with this comfortable pair of tracks from nike. The wide waistband and drawstring will fit your waist neatly while the soft cotton fabric wicks sweat away from the body and keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with tees and sports footwear for trips to the gym.
